summary: Demo Mode Feature - Complete testing of safe demo mode for Polymarket Edge OS dashboard preview. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Demo mode toggle, badge display, data persistence, page navigation, and exit functionality all working correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/demo/status - returns enabled flag, seed, and generated_at
POST /api/demo/enable - enables demo mode and returns seed
POST /api/demo/disable - disables demo mode
POST /api/demo/regenerate - creates new randomized data with new seed
GET /api/demo/status-snapshot - returns simulated running engine state with stats
GET /api/demo/positions - returns 12+ demo positions with correct structure
GET /api/demo/trades - returns 150+ demo trades with correct structure
GET /api/demo/orders - returns order records
GET /api/demo/analytics/summary - returns portfolio metrics (total_pnl, win_rate, profit_factor, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown)
GET /api/demo/analytics/timeseries - returns equity_curve, daily_pnl, drawdown_curve
GET /api/demo/analytics/pnl-history - returns cumulative PnL with points, peak, trough, max_drawdown
GET /api/demo/strategies/arb/opportunities - returns tradable/rejected arb opportunities
GET /api/demo/strategies/arb/executions - returns active/completed executions
GET /api/demo/strategies/sniper/signals - returns tradable/rejected signals
GET /api/demo/strategies/weather/signals - returns tradable/rejected weather signals
GET /api/demo/strategies/weather/forecasts - returns cached forecasts
GET /api/demo/ticker/feed - returns recent trade executions for ticker
GET /api/demo/execution/wallet - returns simulated wallet with ~$14,746 balance
GET /api/demo/config - returns paper mode configuration
GET /api/demo/health - returns healthy/running status
GET /api/health (real) - works independently of demo mode
GET /api/status (real) - works independently of demo mode
frontend_ui_tests: Settings page Demo Mode section renders with data-testid='section-demo-mode'
Demo toggle button with data-testid='demo-toggle-btn' works correctly
Demo mode status badge shows 'OFF' or 'ACTIVE' with data-testid='demo-mode-status-badge'
Regenerate button with data-testid='demo-regenerate-btn' creates new data
DEMO MODE badge appears in TopBar when active with data-testid='demo-mode-badge'
Engine Start/Stop button is HIDDEN when demo mode is active
Overview page shows demo stats: balance ~$14,746, trades ~199, positions ~13, win rate ~62%
Analytics page shows demo metrics: P&L, win rate, profit factor, sharpe ratio, max drawdown
P&L chart renders with demo equity curve showing growth from ~$4,000 to ~$14,000
Positions page shows 12 demo positions with trades (184) and orders tabs
Trade ticker in TopBar scrolls with demo executions (ARB, SNIPER, WEATHER trades)
Demo mode persists via localStorage key 'edgeos_demo_mode' across page refreshes
Demo mode badge persists during SPA navigation between pages
Exit Demo button changes to 'Enter Demo Mode' after disabling
Real data displays correctly after exiting demo mode

test_credentials: None required - demo mode uses generated in-memory data
seed_data_creation: Demo data is auto-generated by DemoDataService with configurable seed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo Mode feature is fully implemented and tested. KEY FEATURES: (1) Demo mode toggle on Settings page (data-testid='demo-toggle-btn') (2) DEMO MODE badge in TopBar (data-testid='demo-mode-badge') when active (3) localStorage persistence via key 'edgeos_demo_mode' (4) All /api/demo/* endpoints return generated data matching real API shapes (5) DemoDataService generates 7-day trading history from ~$4,000 to ~$14,746 with realistic fluctuations (6) 3 strategies with demo data: arb_scanner, crypto_sniper, weather_trader (7) Engine Start/Stop button hidden in demo mode (8) Regenerate button creates new randomized data (9) No real MongoDB data is affected by demo endpoints. SAFETY: Demo mode is completely isolated from real trading logic, strategy logic, and real data.

features_tested.demo_mode_toggle: PASS - Settings page Enter/Exit Demo button works
features_tested.demo_mode_badge: PASS - TopBar shows DEMO MODE badge when active
features_tested.demo_mode_persistence: PASS - localStorage persists demo state across refreshes
features_tested.backend_demo_endpoints: PASS - All /api/demo/* endpoints return generated data
features_tested.overview_page_demo: PASS - Shows populated stats (~$14,746 balance, ~199 trades, ~13 positions, ~62% win rate)
features_tested.analytics_page_demo: PASS - Shows P&L, win rate, profit factor, sharpe, drawdown, P&L curve
features_tested.positions_page_demo: PASS - Shows positions and trade history
features_tested.pnl_chart_demo: PASS - Equity curve renders with realistic data points
features_tested.trade_ticker_demo: PASS - Shows recent trade executions in TopBar
features_tested.exit_demo_mode: PASS - Clicking Exit Demo restores real data, removes badge
features_tested.regenerate_demo_data: PASS - Regenerate button creates new randomized data
features_tested.safety: PASS - No real MongoDB data written or modified by demo endpoints
features_tested.engine_controls_disabled: PASS - Start/Stop button hidden in demo mode
